objective: Detect + prevent insurance fraud across claims, application, and provider networks.
main_kpi: Fraud detection rate; fraud savings; SIU referral conversion; investigation cycle time

tab_content.Overview: Rule-based Screening supports Multi-Layer Screening in Fraud / Special Investigations Unit (SIU).
tab_content.Inputs: Primary inputs come from Fraud / Special Investigations Unit (SIU) systems, customer/broker channels, documents, and external insurance data feeds.
tab_content.AI: Relevant AI agents: Fraud Detection Agent, Anomaly Detection Agent, Graph / Network Analysis Agent, Behavioral Analysis Agent.
tab_content.Outputs: Outputs include workflow decisions, recommendations, explanations, audit rows, and role dashboard signals for Fraud / Special Investigations Unit (SIU).
tab_content.KPIs: Fraud detection rate; fraud savings; SIU referral conversion; investigation cycle time
tab_content.Governance: Tenant-scoped, role-scoped, PII-redacted by default, and audited per decision.
